message:
fix(core): gate unused imports behind asupersync-runtime cfg

The sleep import in memory_budget.rs and timeout import in web/sse.rs
are only used in the non-asupersync fallback paths. Gate them with
#[cfg(not(feature = "asupersync-runtime"))] to eliminate the last 2
compiler warnings under combined feature builds.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
